response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video, breaking it into a dialogue intro (00:00-02:02) and a performance segment (02:03-04:59).
2. Identified the song 'エアーマンが倒せない' (Airman ga Taosenai) via on-screen text.
3. Determined the composer is 'Sera'.
4. Searched for the lyrics using the query '"エアーマンが倒せない" lyrics Japanese English' and retrieved both the original Japanese and English translation.
5. Constructed the JSON response based on the detected scenes and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a conversational introduction followed by a vocal performance of "Airman ga Taosenai" by virtual characters Aiyori and Okayu.

scenes.description: Conversational dialogue introduction by Aiyori, discussing game songs.
Performance of 'Airman ga Taosenai' by Aiyori and Okayu, with on-screen lyrics and credits.
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何回やっても 何回やっても
エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻 何回やってもよけれない
後ろに回って 撃ち続けても
いずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も 試してみたけど
どうしても避けきれない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try
I can't defeat Airman
That tornado, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge it
Even if I get behind him and keep shooting
Eventually I'll be blown away by the wind
I tried spamming the time button too
But I just can't dodge it all
